productDisplayName: Baggit Women Purple Auxi Lally Wallet
description: Style NoteWith its unusual colour story and chic styling this wallet from baggit easily makes it into our wishlist this Summer. Carry it with western and ethnic outfits to infuse a touch of  glamour to your ensemble. Its multiple pockets and slots help you stay organised- in style. Product DetailsTwo fold purple wallet with press button closure Shimmery bow and patch with inverse box pleat on the frontOnce opened six credit card slots, one photo id card holder and two slip pockets on one side and seven credit card slots with two slip pockets on the other Two zippered pockets at back with brandingMaterials and CareFabricWipe with damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 11 cmWidth: 20 cm
